titleStmt.title: SII 28.16: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 16. (A.R. No. 16 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record in prefaced by the reference to the regnal year of a Chōḷa king whose name cannot be clearly read on the impression (it was given in the Annual Report as Vikrama, possibly on account of the next number which lists the same śivabrāhamaṇas as in this number referring itself to the reign of Vikrama-chōḷa. On this basis, it was commented upon in the part II, para 34 of the Annual Report for 1915, that contrary to the statements in the ulās written in honour of Kulōttuṅga-chōḷa II and Rājarāja-chōla II, this record attributes the honour of covering the temple of Tiruchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār with gold to Vikrama-chōḻa.

Records a benefaction in paddy (stated to have amounted to 32 kalam in line 3 and 54 kalam of paddy subsequently in line 4) as capital for the stated services on every Saturday for God Tirukkuṟaṅgāḍutuṟai-uḍaiya-Mahādēvar of Iṟaiyān-puñchey a brahmadēyam in Tēnūr-vāḍikai-ugaḷūrkuṟṟam in Mu[uma]ḍi-chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. by a vēḷaikkāran

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār tirumāḷikaiyun tirukkopuramum poṉmentaruḷi ḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu vaṭakarai mummaṭicoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tenūr vāṭikai Ukaḷur kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Iṟaiyāvān punce
y t tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟaiyuṭaiya mahādevaṟku Amparnāṭṭu Ampāruṭaiya viccātaran kāriyānaāmparu nāṭṭu veḷa ttara veḷaikkāṟan tirukkuraṅkāṭu tuṟaiyuṭaiya mahādevaṟku cani Eṇṇaikkāppukkum canippaṭi tiruvamutukkum vaitta nimantam
pāl cani toṟum kuṟṟam toṟum kunṟa Uḻakkāleyuḻak keṇṇaiyum cātti marakkāppuppu is written toṅether.m ta c kkāppum cātta [3 10 2] kalam muppattiru kalamum Inel kalattukku kalaneRead kalanālmukkuṟuṇi polinta nel koṇṭu tiru Eṇṇai kāppuppu is written toṅether.cātti tirumañcaṉam paInserted below the line.ṇṇi tiruvamutu
ceykaikku nāṅkaḷ Upaiyamāka koṇṭa nellaimpattu nāṟkalamum koṇṭu kalattukku mukkuṟuṇiyāl Añciraṇṭāka tūkkut talarici nānā ḻiyum kaṟiyamutum Ikkoyili[ l śi] vabrāhmāṇan pālāṉāyan nārāyaṇan kālakālanāna panmayeśvara paṭṭanum pālāṉāyan can
racekaran piccanāna nāṟppatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭanum pālāśraya nārāyaṇan(ā) tirutevanāna paracamaiya � paṭṭanum pāratāyan cūriyauttamacoḻanāna tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭanum pāratāya[rāja] siṁhama mahādevanāna dekṣiṇāmurtti paṇṭitanum Ivvanaivom Ikkoyilil kuṭamumalakum koṇṭu pukuvār panmāheśvara rakṣai
y cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavom .
Digital edition of SII 28.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
